tagline: The Databricks Assistant can now also use models served through Anthropic on Databricks as part of the Data Science Agent when partner powered AI features are enabled.
what_it_does: The Databricks Assistant can now also use models served through Anthropic on Databricks as part of the Data Science Agent when partner powered AI features are enabled. Anthropic on Databricks uses endpoints hosted by Databricks within the Databricks security perimeter. The partner powered AI features setting controls whether some features are powered by models hosted by a partner provider.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

key_takeaway: The Databricks Assistant can now also use models served through Anthropic on Databricks as part of the Data Science Agent when partner powered AI features are enabled.
